results.title: Availability of deposit invariant can be bypassed
results.reasoning: Yes. The report explicitly identifies both mechanisms used to bypass the invariant described in H-01: (1) In _claim for non-ETH tokens, claimedAmount is set to address(this).balance instead of the swap delta (Report Issue #1), allowing a user to donate ETH and immediately capture it via claim—exactly Scenario 1. (2) In convertAllETH, totalLpETH is taken from lpETH.balanceOf(address(this)) instead of using the deposit delta (Report Issue #5), inflating the claim ratio if tokens are present pre-conversion—matching the invariant break in Scenario 2 (though the report frames it as pre-existing lpETH rather than ETH donation, it’s the same code path and delta-vs-absolute bug). Fixing these reported issues (use swap delta in _claim; use balance delta for convertAllETH accounting) would fix the vulnerabilities described in H-01.
